mnemonics: S.B.I.F.T. (Project Team Roles): Super User, Business Analyst, Infrastructure Designer, Functional Analyst, Technical Analyst
keyPoints: The project team requires a mix of business and IT professionals.
Key roles include a project manager, business analyst, and data modeler.
Effective communication between all team members is critical for success.
commonMistakes: Underestimating the need for a strong business representative (e.g., Super User).
Assuming the team is only composed of technical IT staff, neglecting business expertise.
